TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ke-ha-u_abinacadan, title = Ke-ha-u_abinacadan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ke-ha-u_abinacadan} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == Kahau a binacadan u kamu nuheni tu atu lalangawan atu pacay a binacadan masasengitu, kiyu pakayni i inenciyacu ku tulas kiyu palecad han tu malecaday a binacadan Maydih mikaykic tu ni kalealaw tu ngangan nu binacadan, ci lay-kuwan-e a midinduay maydih pani i Abuan angangan amupulung tinatusaay a binacadan. Abuan ťÄôŚÄčŚźćÁ®ĪšĺÜśēīŚźąšļĆśóŹ. nilacilan Maydih mikaykic tu nu kahau a binacadan kiyu yamabelecay tu ci pancinnay a laylay a tademaw nadikudan ci pan-yung-li atu duma kehau a nababalakian. cinida matineng mudadiw tu kehau nu mukasi a datuk midatengay tu nababalaki sananay a dadiw, (aiyan; ŚďÄÁÖô)kamu nu pacay, dumasa nu ayelan a tidaay yamabelecay tu ci pan-cin-i a tatayna, nau matinengay musakamu tu nu pacay a kamu. "(aiyan; ŚďÄÁÖô). . Daduducan a lalangawan dikuc śúćť£ĺ Kehau a binacadan u kakawsan nu heni adikuc idaw ku sumanahay langdaway, salengacay a kulit, yadah ku masangkakuay, patelekkay masadumaay a kaku nu kulit, ukulit atu nukulitan yadah ku masumaday, i likisi nu taywan tu sasingaan tu cacanan u pacay a binacadan nu mukasi a cacanan, u kapahay nu sining a hata idaw ku kulit nu hata, widasa nu kakawsan nu kehau a binacadan a kulit kuyda. kakanen ť£≤ť£ü u alakuy, epah, mantaay a titi ni sasilawan, damay atu lami. . datuk ťü≥ś®ā ya hungcaw a pacakayay tu likudu uidaway nu kehau a datuk "pacay a bunacadan,kehau a binacadan Ayan a datuk, wini u minanamay ci u-zung-sun mikilim I niyadu kyu makaala. ulisin ÁĮÄśÖ∂ kehau a tademaw nikahedekan namilangec milisin atu malalikid, hidasatu alaw han mala piusiwkacuan nu kehau, kiyu u singacu nu huwan sa. mu-raraw a razem)atu u pan a singanganay a miusiwgacu, i nu pikalukan a kuyumisabaw cacayay a bulad sabaw lima a demiad, asikawaw, misahemay tu nu kakawsan a hemay tu lami' misakukuy, (tupalis yamadu/(mubuiak tupalis yamadu)usapisa kukuy, mikawaw tu mutengteng tu umah, (mahalit ubinacadan i umaumahan musaliyut tu ngidu mudadiw Ayan nuheni a didiw, mudakepay tu tabakiay a buting (tia kumuxay alaw)paculil tu hacuk maazazuah)acacana akawaw,amikining tu nababalaki milunguc tu pakadaesu, mupulung tu kapah nu binacadan. "(mu-raraw a razem)śąĖ" "ťėŅśčČÁ≤Ņ"(tupalis yamadu/(mubuiak tupalis yamadu)Áāļ" "(mahalit,śóŹšļļŚú®ÁĒįťĖďŚúćÁĀęŚĒĪAyanśĮćŤ™ěśõ≤Ť™Ņś≠ĆŤ¨†),"śäďŚ§ßť≠ö"(tia kumuxay alaw),"ŤĶįś®ô"(maazazuah) . pikulit tu bihid ÁīčťĚĘ Anli, sawla, uniwlan, alise, puyalihan muliwliw tu laway nu tatayna amikulit, masadip ku nipikulit, pulung han bangecal , nika mikulit aca tu udiudipan sa, masadumaay kuyda.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == kańßau a bina ¶adan u kamu nuńß…ôni tu atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu pa ¶aj a bina ¶adan masas…ôŇčitu, kiju pakajni i in…ôn ¶ija ¶u ku tur~…ĺas kiju par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a bina ¶adan majdińß mikajki ¶ tu ni kar~…ĺ…ôar~…ĺaw tu ŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan, ¶i r~…ĺaj-kuwan-…ô a midinduaj majdińß pani i abuan aŇčaŇčan amupur~…ĺuŇč tinatusaaj a bina ¶adan. abuan *********. nir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺan majdińß mikajki ¶ tu nu kańßau a bina ¶adan kiju jamab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj tu ¶i pan ¶innaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw nadikudan ¶i pan-juŇč-r~…ĺi atu duma k…ôńßau a nababar~…ĺakian. ¶inida matin…ôŇč mudadiw tu k…ôńßau nu mukasi a datuk midat…ôŇčaj tu nababar~…ĺaki sananaj a dadiw, (aijan; **)kamu nu pa ¶aj, dumasa nu aj…ôr~…ĺan a tidaaj jamab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj tu ¶i pan- ¶in-i a tatajna, nau matin…ôŇčaj musakamu tu nu pa ¶aj a kamu. "(aijan; **). . dadudu ¶an a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan diku ¶ ** k…ôńßau a bina ¶adan u kakawsan nu ńß…ôni adiku ¶ idaw ku sumanańßaj r~…ĺaŇčdawaj, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a kur~…ĺit, jadańß ku masaŇčkakuaj, pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkkaj masadumaaj a kaku nu kur~…ĺit, ukur~…ĺit atu nukur~…ĺitan jadańß ku masumadaj, i r~…ĺikisi nu tajwan tu sasiŇčaan tu ¶a ¶anan u pa ¶aj a bina ¶adan nu mukasi a ¶a ¶anan, u kapańßaj nu siniŇč a ńßata idaw ku kur~…ĺit nu ńßata, widasa nu kakawsan nu k…ôńßau a bina ¶adan a kur~…ĺit kujda. kakan…ôn ** u ar~…ĺakuj, …ôpańß, mantaaj a titi ni sasir~…ĺawan, damaj atu r~…ĺami. . datuk ** ja ńßuŇč ¶aw a pa ¶akajaj tu r~…ĺikudu uidawaj nu k…ôńßau a datuk "pa ¶aj a buna ¶adan,k…ôńßau a bina ¶adan ajan a datuk, wini u minanamaj ¶i u-zuŇč-sun mikir~…ĺim i nijadu kju makaar~…ĺa. ur~…ĺisin ** k…ôńßau a tad…ômaw nikańß…ôd…ôkan namir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ mir~…ĺisin atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺikid, ńßidasatu ar~…ĺaw ńßan mar~…ĺa piusiwka ¶uan nu k…ôńßau, kiju u siŇča ¶u nu ńßuwan sa. mu-raraw a raz…ôm)atu u pan a siŇčaŇčanaj a miusiwga ¶u, i nu pikar~…ĺukan a kujumisabaw ¶a ¶ajaj a bur~…ĺad sabaw r~…ĺima a d…ômiad, asikawaw, misańß…ômaj tu nu kakawsan a ńß…ômaj tu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° misakukuj, (tupar~…ĺis jamadu/(mubuiak tupar~…ĺis jamadu)usapisa kukuj, mikawaw tu mut…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu umańß, (mańßar~…ĺit ubina ¶adan i umaumańßan musar~…ĺijut tu Ňčidu mudadiw ajan nuńß…ôni a didiw, mudak…ôpaj tu tabakiaj a butiŇč (tia kumu*aj ar~…ĺaw)pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu ńßa ¶uk maazazuańß)a ¶a ¶ana akawaw,amikiniŇč tu nababar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu pakada…ôsu, mupur~…ĺuŇč tu kapańß nu bina ¶adan. "(mu-raraw a raz…ôm)*" "***"(tupar~…ĺis jamadu/(mubuiak tupar~…ĺis jamadu)*" "(mańßar~…ĺit,********ajan******),"***"(tia kumu*aj ar~…ĺaw),"**"(maazazuańß) . pikur~…ĺit tu bińßid ** anr~…ĺi, sawr~…ĺa, uniwr~…ĺan, ar~…ĺis…ô, pujar~…ĺińßan mur~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tu r~…ĺawaj nu tatajna amikur~…ĺit, masadip ku nipikur~…ĺit, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan baŇč…ô ¶ar~…ĺ , nika mikur~…ĺit a ¶a tu udiudipan sa, masadumaaj kujda.
S.FORM: == kakiliman == Kahau a binacadan u kamu nuheni tu atu lalangawan atu pacay a binacadan masasengitu, kiyu pakayni i inenciyacu ku tulas kiyu palecad han tu malecaday a binacadan Maydih mikaykic tu ni kalealaw tu ngangan nu binacadan, ci lay-kuwan-e a midinduay maydih pani i Abuan angangan amupulung tinatusaay a binacadan. Abuan ťÄôŚÄčŚźćÁ®ĪšĺÜśēīŚźąšļĆśóŹ. nilacilan Maydih mikaykic tu nu kahau a binacadan kiyu yamabelecay tu ci pancinnay a laylay a tademaw nadikudan ci pan-yung-li atu duma kehau a nababalakian. cinida matineng mudadiw tu kehau nu mukasi a datuk midatengay tu nababalaki sananay a dadiw, (aiyan; ŚďÄÁÖô)kamu nu pacay, dumasa nu ayelan a tidaay yamabelecay tu ci pan-cin-i a tatayna, nau matinengay musakamu tu nu pacay a kamu. "(aiyan; ŚďÄÁÖô). . Daduducan a lalangawan dikuc śúćť£ĺ Kehau a binacadan u kakawsan nu heni adikuc idaw ku sumanahay langdaway, salengacay a kulit, yadah ku masangkakuay, patelekkay masadumaay a kaku nu kulit, ukulit atu nukulitan yadah ku masumaday, i likisi nu taywan tu sasingaan tu cacanan u pacay a binacadan nu mukasi a cacanan, u kapahay nu sining a hata idaw ku kulit nu hata, widasa nu kakawsan nu kehau a binacadan a kulit kuyda. kakanen ť£≤ť£ü u alakuy, epah, mantaay a titi ni sasilawan, damay atu lami. . datuk ťü≥ś®ā ya hungcaw a pacakayay tu likudu uidaway nu kehau a datuk "pacay a bunacadan,kehau a binacadan Ayan a datuk, wini u minanamay ci u-zung-sun mikilim I niyadu kyu makaala. ulisin ÁĮÄśÖ∂ kehau a tademaw nikahedekan namilangec milisin atu malalikid, hidasatu alaw han mala piusiwkacuan nu kehau, kiyu u singacu nu huwan sa. mu-raraw a razem)atu u pan a singanganay a miusiwgacu, i nu pikalukan a kuyumisabaw cacayay a bulad sabaw lima a demiad, asikawaw, misahemay tu nu kakawsan a hemay tu lami' misakukuy, (tupalis yamadu/(mubuiak tupalis yamadu)usapisa kukuy, mikawaw tu mutengteng tu umah, (mahalit ubinacadan i umaumahan musaliyut tu ngidu mudadiw Ayan nuheni a didiw, mudakepay tu tabakiay a buting (tia kumuxay alaw)paculil tu hacuk maazazuah)acacana akawaw,amikining tu nababalaki milunguc tu pakadaesu, mupulung tu kapah nu binacadan. "(mu-raraw a razem)śąĖ" "ťėŅśčČÁ≤Ņ"(tupalis yamadu/(mubuiak tupalis yamadu)Áāļ" "(mahalit,śóŹšļļŚú®ÁĒįťĖďŚúćÁĀęŚĒĪAyanśĮćŤ™ěśõ≤Ť™Ņś≠ĆŤ¨†),"śäďŚ§ßť≠ö"(tia kumuxay alaw),"ŤĶįś®ô"(maazazuah) . pikulit tu bihid ÁīčťĚĘ Anli, sawla, uniwlan, alise, puyalihan muliwliw tu laway nu tatayna amikulit, masadip ku nipikulit, pulung han bangecal , nika mikulit aca tu udiudipan sa, masadumaay kuyda.
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == kańßau a bina ¶adan u kamu nuńß…ôni tu atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan atu pa ¶aj a bina ¶adan masas…ôŇčitu, kiju pakajni i in…ôn ¶ija ¶u ku tur~…ĺas kiju par~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ńßan tu mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj a bina ¶adan majdińß mikajki ¶ tu ni kar~…ĺ…ôar~…ĺaw tu ŇčaŇčan nu bina ¶adan, ¶i r~…ĺaj-kuwan-…ô a midinduaj majdińß pani i abuan aŇčaŇčan amupur~…ĺuŇč tinatusaaj a bina ¶adan. abuan *********. nir~…ĺa ¶ir~…ĺan majdińß mikajki ¶ tu nu kańßau a bina ¶adan kiju jamab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj tu ¶i pan ¶innaj a r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw nadikudan ¶i pan-juŇč-r~…ĺi atu duma k…ôńßau a nababar~…ĺakian. ¶inida matin…ôŇč mudadiw tu k…ôńßau nu mukasi a datuk midat…ôŇčaj tu nababar~…ĺaki sananaj a dadiw, (aijan; **)kamu nu pa ¶aj, dumasa nu aj…ôr~…ĺan a tidaaj jamab…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶aj tu ¶i pan- ¶in-i a tatajna, nau matin…ôŇčaj musakamu tu nu pa ¶aj a kamu. "(aijan; **). . dadudu ¶an a r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan diku ¶ ** k…ôńßau a bina ¶adan u kakawsan nu ńß…ôni adiku ¶ idaw ku sumanańßaj r~…ĺaŇčdawaj, sar~…ĺ…ôŇča ¶aj a kur~…ĺit, jadańß ku masaŇčkakuaj, pat…ôr~…ĺ…ôkkaj masadumaaj a kaku nu kur~…ĺit, ukur~…ĺit atu nukur~…ĺitan jadańß ku masumadaj, i r~…ĺikisi nu tajwan tu sasiŇčaan tu ¶a ¶anan u pa ¶aj a bina ¶adan nu mukasi a ¶a ¶anan, u kapańßaj nu siniŇč a ńßata idaw ku kur~…ĺit nu ńßata, widasa nu kakawsan nu k…ôńßau a bina ¶adan a kur~…ĺit kujda. kakan…ôn ** u ar~…ĺakuj, …ôpańß, mantaaj a titi ni sasir~…ĺawan, damaj atu r~…ĺami. . datuk ** ja ńßuŇč ¶aw a pa ¶akajaj tu r~…ĺikudu uidawaj nu k…ôńßau a datuk "pa ¶aj a buna ¶adan,k…ôńßau a bina ¶adan ajan a datuk, wini u minanamaj ¶i u-zuŇč-sun mikir~…ĺim i nijadu kju makaar~…ĺa. ur~…ĺisin ** k…ôńßau a tad…ômaw nikańß…ôd…ôkan namir~…ĺaŇč…ô ¶ mir~…ĺisin atu mar~…ĺar~…ĺikid, ńßidasatu ar~…ĺaw ńßan mar~…ĺa piusiwka ¶uan nu k…ôńßau, kiju u siŇča ¶u nu ńßuwan sa. mu-raraw a raz…ôm)atu u pan a siŇčaŇčanaj a miusiwga ¶u, i nu pikar~…ĺukan a kujumisabaw ¶a ¶ajaj a bur~…ĺad sabaw r~…ĺima a d…ômiad, asikawaw, misańß…ômaj tu nu kakawsan a ńß…ômaj tu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° misakukuj, (tupar~…ĺis jamadu/(mubuiak tupar~…ĺis jamadu)usapisa kukuj, mikawaw tu mut…ôŇčt…ôŇč tu umańß, (mańßar~…ĺit ubina ¶adan i umaumańßan musar~…ĺijut tu Ňčidu mudadiw ajan nuńß…ôni a didiw, mudak…ôpaj tu tabakiaj a butiŇč (tia kumu*aj ar~…ĺaw)pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu ńßa ¶uk maazazuańß)a ¶a ¶ana akawaw,amikiniŇč tu nababar~…ĺaki mir~…ĺuŇču ¶ tu pakada…ôsu, mupur~…ĺuŇč tu kapańß nu bina ¶adan. "(mu-raraw a raz…ôm)*" "***"(tupar~…ĺis jamadu/(mubuiak tupar~…ĺis jamadu)*" "(mańßar~…ĺit,********ajan******),"***"(tia kumu*aj ar~…ĺaw),"**"(maazazuańß) . pikur~…ĺit tu bińßid ** anr~…ĺi, sawr~…ĺa, uniwr~…ĺan, ar~…ĺis…ô, pujar~…ĺińßan mur~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw tu r~…ĺawaj nu tatajna amikur~…ĺit, masadip ku nipikur~…ĺit, pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan baŇč…ô ¶ar~…ĺ , nika mikur~…ĺit a ¶a tu udiudipan sa, masadumaaj kujda.
